_comment: Sample spec for `v2 social post --spec`. One blog → many infographics. Platform cadence is configurable: 'each' = one post per infographic (unique per-platform captions); 'once' = one post per blog (batch 0 only). Defaults: facebook/instagram/pinterest=each; linkedin/twitter/reddit/youtube=once. Override per-spec with the optional `cadence` map below, or globally via SOCIAL_PER_INFOGRAPHIC / SOCIAL_PER_BLOG env. Every post links back to blog_url.

cadence._comment: Optional. Reclassify any platform. Here reddit stays once-per-blog (default) but could be set to 'each'. Remove this block to use defaults/env.

captions.facebook: Before you compare SEO prices, compare what is actually included. A one-time SEO foundation covers an audit, technical fixes, and Google Business Profile cleanup — monthly support is different work. Full breakdown: https://smallbusinessseo.services/blog/small-business-seo-pricing #SmallBusinessSEO #LocalSEO #SEOPricing
